headline: Lithium ETF LIT Returned 125% to Investors Who Bought at Last Year’s Low
summary: A year ago, lithium was the trade nobody wanted. The Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF (NYSEARCA:LIT) had been bleeding for the better part of three years, EV demand headlines were a graveyard, and the consensus take was that oversupply from Chinese converters would keep lithium carbonate prices pinned to the floor through the ... Lithium ETF LIT Returned 125% to Investors Who Bought at Last Year’s Low

headline: Expanding AI Footprint Lifts Moat Stocks
summary: The S&P 500 gained 5.26% in May, but leadership was narrow, with mega-cap tech driving most of the gain. Read more here.
